revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a 64x64 pixel-art terrain autotile sheet for a game, profile snes16_platformer_v1. Strict 4 columns x 4 rows, 16 frames total, each frame exactly 16x16 px. No visible grid lines, borders, labels, text, tile IDs, watermark, UI, or separators. Every tile stays inside its own 16x16 cell, same scale, filled edge-to-edge, fully opaque.

Subject: bright mythical-Japan satoyama top-down grass meadow autotile set with lush painterly grass blending into soft bare earth. Use crisp high-resolution 16-bit-style pixel art: crisp low-resolution pixel clusters, no antialiasing blur, consistent palette, one-pixel dark outline where useful, top-left golden-hour light source. Palette: deep matcha and emerald greens, warm yellow-green sunlight, soft shadows, tiny clover and wildflowers, gentle painterly gradients expressed through readable pixel clusters, not flat and not chunky.

Resolve the sheet as grass meadow/earth transitions, not coastline. Layout:
Row 1: four solid interior grass variations, fully tileable, no edges.
Row 2: grass-to-bare-earth edge transitions in order N, S, W, E; lush grass on the inside, fading softly to bare earth on that one side.
Row 3: outer corners in order NW, NE, SW, SE; grass occupies the inner quadrant and blends softly into bare earth near the outside corner.
Row 4: accent tiles in order: mossy rock, small flower cluster, bare dirt patch, clover patch.

Tile quality: avoid visible checkerboard or repeated square stamps; vary texture, edge breakup, lighting, grass overlap, chipped edges, soft blends, and tiny regional patches while keeping a cohesive tile set. Transitions must be soft and smooth, never hard stair-steps or rectangular bands. World-map scale feeling: broad grassland color drift and low-frequency texture, not close-up village ground detail.

Background/empty-space rule: tiles fill their cells edge-to-edge and are fully opaque; if any unused empty pixels exist, fill them with solid #FF00FF magenta. Do not use transparency.

Avoid all copyrighted franchise characters, logos, likenesses, letter emblems, modern objects, weapons, armor, helmets, ninja/samurai outfits, guns, birds, companion creatures, horror mood, dark gloomy palette, and any text.
